name: jetson-edgellm-v080-qwen3ttsbase
description: v0.8.0 edgellm STREAMING ASR (Qwen3-ASR) + Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-0.6B-BASE TTS via the existing jetson.trt_edge_llm backend driving our v0.8.0 base streaming worker (qwen3_tts_streaming_worker). The BASE model conditions on an EXTERNAL speaker embedding (NOT CustomVoice named speakers): a fixed precomputed 1024-d base64 embedding is supplied via EDGE_LLM_TTS_BASE_SPK_EMBED_PATH and the backend injects it as speaker_embedding_b64 on every request. Engines built on-device with ENABLE_CUTE_DSL=OFF (CuTe-DSL GEMM not viable on sm_87; talker MLP uses the cuBLAS-free tiled/M1 GEMV fallback). KV capped (maxKVCacheCapacity 1536) so N=2 fits 8GB Orin Nano. The worker needs EDGELLM_PLUGIN_PATH (libNvInfer_edgellm_plugin.so dlopen'd at build/run) on LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/local/cuda/lib64. Verified on orin-nano: RTF 0.69, warm TTFA 0.54s, N=2 parallel OK, intelligible (faster-whisper round-trip). DERIVED from jetson-edgellm-v080-moss: ASR half copied verbatim; only the TTS half swapped. Dev paths (orin-nano validation): worker ~/project/edgellm-v080-build/build/examples/omni/qwen3_tts_streaming_worker, engines ~/project/qwen3-tts-base-v080-engines, tokenizer+embedding ~/project/qwen3-tts-base-v080-onnx/llm + ref_embedding.b64.txt. Production paths below assume the bake layout under /opt.
